No. 398—GAth. Congress.
An Act to Provide a Civil Government for¬

And For Other Purpose

Rico and to the adiacent islands bellonging to

ma me name porto migo as nosa in lo de¬
han be hela to inclue nor on las islana or
mar mane bue al que adincent islando as afor¬
mal.
